summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Vardhaman Sanskar Dham NGO website with admin panel. All backend APIs and frontend admin panel functionality working correctly.
passed_tests: Admin login with correct credentials (vsddomb@gmail.com / Admin@VSD2024)
Admin dashboard loads with all 6 sections (Activities, About, Events, Gallery, Contact, Donation)
All backend API endpoints working (20/20 tests passed)
Activities CRUD operations (GET, POST, PUT, DELETE)
Events CRUD operations (GET, POST, PUT, DELETE)
All navigation sections working (Home, Activities, About, Events, Gallery, Contact)
Frontend displays updated data from admin changes
Responsive design and proper color scheme (dark royal blue with amber)
